Verify that Selective Permissions Intervention issue is generated.

Inspector issue: {
    issue : {
        code : SelectivePermissionsInterventionIssue
        details : {
            selectivePermissionsInterventionIssueDetails : {
                adAncestry : {
                    adAncestryChain : [
                        [0] : {
                            debuggerId : <string>
                            name : .../issues/resources/trigger-geo.js
                            scriptId : <string>
                        }
                    ]
                    rootScriptFilterlistRule : trigger-geo.js|
                }
                apiName : geolocation
                stackTrace : {
                    callFrames : [
                        [0] : {
                            columnNumber : 24
                            functionName : callGeo
                            lineNumber : 1
                            scriptId : <string>
                            url : .../issues/resources/trigger-geo.js
                        }
                        [1] : {
                            columnNumber : 0
                            functionName :
                            lineNumber : 4
                            scriptId : <string>
                            url : .../issues/resources/trigger-geo.js
                        }
                    ]
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
